sources.name: 北市警政APP_防空避難設備位置
sources.notes: Generated from local raw CSV when scripts are run.

sources.name: 臺北市住宅竊盜點位資訊
sources.notes: Burglary addresses are pre-blurred by the data source and are aggregated in the app.

sources.name: 臺北市AED自動體外心臟去顫器設置地點
sources.notes: Generated from the uploaded UTF-8-SIG CSV.

sources.name: 臺北市登革熱病媒蚊密度調查結果
sources.notes: District and village survey results; no exact coordinates are provided.

sources.name: 臺北市疏散門資訊
sources.notes: WGS84 location records; operating status is not real-time.

sources.name: 臺北市公私立醫療院所－臺北市醫院清冊
sources.notes: Hospital location records with WGS84 coordinates.

sources.name: 臺北市公私立醫療院所－臺北市診所清冊
sources.notes: Clinic location records with WGS84 coordinates.

sources.name: 大臺北地區消防栓分布點位圖
sources.notes: Greater Taipei hydrant records from 北水處; full hydrant JSON is lazy-loaded and not PWA-cached.

sources.name: 臺北市可供避難收容處所一覽表
sources.notes: Taipei emergency shelter public-data directory; records have no coordinates and are shown as district summaries plus address links.

sources.name: 臺北市CCTV設施
sources.notes: Traffic CCTV equipment location records from 交通局交工處; no live video, camera direction, or monitoring coverage is provided.

sources.name: 臺北市歷次天然災害停止上班上課訊息
sources.notes: Historical natural-disaster work/school suspension messages from 人事處; raw decision text is preserved and classifications are auxiliary only.

sources.name: 臺北市自行車竊盜點位資訊
sources.notes: Historical bicycle theft public-safety records from 警察局刑警大隊; incident locations are pre-fuzzed text and are never geocoded into exact markers.

sources.name: 臺北市機車竊盜點位資訊
sources.notes: Historical motorcycle theft public-safety records from 警察局刑警大隊; incident locations are pre-fuzzed text and are never geocoded into exact markers.

locationParseWarnings: 臺北市羅斯福路六段與景華街口
臺北市環河南路及環河北路沿線
臺北市內湖路一段737巷50弄31 - 60號
臺北市承德路七段與公館路口旁人行道機車格
臺北市甘州街與歸綏街口之停車格
臺北市忠孝東路7段124巷的橋上

notes: Residential burglary records remain blurred and are never geocoded into exact household-level markers.
Bicycle theft records use pre-fuzzed address text and are shown only as district, road, and fuzzy-location summaries.
Motorcycle theft records use pre-fuzzed address text and are shown only as district, road, and fuzzy-location summaries.
Burglary time periods: morning, early_morning, afternoon, evening, night
Dengue records are shown only as district/village survey aggregates.
Evacuation gate records do not represent real-time operating status or safe routes.
Medical facility records do not represent real-time opening, emergency-service, or care availability.
Fire hydrant records do not represent real-time availability, fire-response deployment, or fire-safety level.
Emergency shelter records do not represent real-time opening status, remaining capacity, or official evacuation instructions.
CCTV records do not provide live video, camera direction, monitoring coverage, or public-safety scoring.
Natural disaster suspension records are historical administrative messages and do not represent real-time closure status, forecasts, or emergency instructions.
